title: Up to 58% Off on Chicago Loop Luxury: Cut, Color, or Highlights at XEX Hair Gallery

pricing_options.label: Women's Haircut with Root Touch Up

highlights_html: Chicago Loop Luxury: Haircut with Color or Dimensional Highlights
highlights_text: Chicago Loop Luxury: Haircut with Color or Dimensional Highlights
about_deal_html:
Located in the heart of the Chicago Loop, XEX Hair Gallery is an Aveda Concept Salon dedicated to high-quality artistry and the health of your hair. Whether you’re looking for a dramatic transformation or a seasonal refresh, our team of skilled stylists specializes in creating looks that are as unique as you are.

Experience a personalized consultation where we tailor your service to your face shape, lifestyle, and hair goals. From the precision of a modern blunt bob to the sun-kissed dimension of a lived-in balayage, we use premium products to ensure a finish that is vibrant, healthy, and easy to maintain.

Choose from four transformative packages:

  • Women's Haircut with Root Touch Up: Precision cut paired with up to 40g of color to seamlessly blend 1–2 inches of regrowth.

  • Women’s Haircut & Single-Process Color: A total refresh featuring up to 80g of color for a rich, high-shine, monochrome finish from roots to ends.

  • Women’s Haircut & Partial Highlights: Add strategic brightness and depth to frame your face.

  • Women’s Haircut & Full Highlights: Maximum dimension and brightness for a high-impact look.

  • Women’s Haircut & Partial Balayage: Hand-painted, seamless transitions for that coveted "effortless" glow.

review_quotes.text: It’s inside a big building so give yourself time to find your way!
review_quotes.author: Charlie

review_quotes.text: Love Ilana. May be spelling her name wrong. Will return. She is absolutely a 5 star find
review_quotes.author: donnajill

review_quotes.text: Elisa is wonderful! She is so thorough, taking her time to do an exceptional job. She’s also really great at making recommendations for colors. I highly recommend seeing Elisa at XEX Salon!
review_quotes.author: Guest

review_quotes.text: Such an amazing transformation! Thank you, Ilisa!
review_quotes.author: Olayinka
